title: Nyan Cat
description: A simple mod adds a Nyan Cat block and Nyan Cat Rainbow block from Minetest. This block available only for creative mode
body:
A simple mod adds a Nyan Cat block and Nyan Cat Rainbow block from Minetest. This block available only for creative mode. Have fun!

You can see more Minetest ports
https://modrinth.com/mod/mese-ore
https://modrinth.com/mod/item-snatcher
